insights.title: Needs attention
insights.revenue_up_clients_down: Revenue is up but active clients are down — check for churn
insights.clients_at_risk: {{count}} client(s) haven't attended in over 3 weeks — churn risk
insights.lesson_overfull: "{{name}}" on {{weekday, weekday}} at {{hour}}:00 has been {{pct}}% full for three weeks in a row — consider adding another session
insights.trial_low_conversion: Only {{pct}}% of {{buyers}} trial buyers went on to buy a subscription — consider a campaign
insights.fastest_growing_product: "{{name}}" is growing fastest: +{{pct}}% vs the previous period
insights.renewals_low: Only {{pct}}% of clients with an expired subscription renew — consider a reminder

salesCount.title: Sales
salesCount.text: count Operation, type='in', by op_date in the period

revenue.title: Revenue
revenue.text: Σ Operation.amount, type='in', by op_date in the period

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.text: count Reservation status='attended' (joined to Lesson within the period)

noshow.title: No-show
noshow.text: Reservation status='active' AND the lesson has already ended (start_time + duration_min < now)

activeClients.title: Active clients
activeClients.text: distinct client_id with an attendance in the period

occupancy.title: Occupancy
occupancy.text: occupied spots (active+attended) / Σ total_spots across non-cancelled lessons in the period

retention.title: Retention
retention.text: share of last period's clients who returned this period

returning.title: Returning
returning.text: attended this period AND attended before the period

lost.title: Lost
lost.text: attended last period, no attendance this period

clientValue.title: Client value
clientValue.text: Revenue from client_id / distinct such clients

repeatPurchaseShare.title: Repeat purchase share
repeatPurchaseShare.text: clients with ≥2 income operations / clients with ≥1

renewalRate.title: Renewal rate
renewalRate.text: from /loyalty/retention: bought the next package after the previous one expired

revenuePerHour.title: Revenue per hour (trainer)
revenuePerHour.text: Σ income operations with trainer_id / Σ hours of their lessons

trainerReturnRate.title: Return rate (trainer)
trainerReturnRate.text: clients with ≥2 visits to this trainer / clients with ≥1

missedRevenue.title: Missed revenue
missedRevenue.text: Σ (empty spots × Lesson.price) across past non-cancelled lessons

filtersScope.title: Filter scope
filtersScope.text: operations have no hall/branch — Branch/Hall filters only affect lesson-based metrics
